title: Master Hermes Agent in 41 mins
summary: Keith Rumjahn demonstrates how to build a practical personal AI system using Hermes as the center, connecting it to Telegram, Gmail, Google Calendar, Apple Health, and other services. The video covers local deployment with Ollama, cloud deployment with OpenRouter Spawn, dashboard configuration, skills and workflows, and integration strategies including combined use with OpenClaw.
